title: oxalis aridicola
intro: Oxalis aridicola, also known as the desert wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anthelmintic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. Oxalis aridicola has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
